synopsis: The return of Maul in Star Wars Rebels changed Ezra Bridger’s life forever. Desperate to seek revenge, Maul grasps at the first glimpse of hope he can find: Two Jedi and one former enemy on a world filled with evil. If Ahsoka Tano won’t let him escape again, at least he can use Kanan’s padawan to learn where Kenobi might be hiding.
title: Rebels: Maul (cinestory comic)
